h0c77154cg768ag422cg983eg489094693e09: I pray the Treefather nourishes Kagha's wounded soul, now that she is dead.
h11b7b5d1ge280g4a2ag8beag2369653d5431: When Kagha shirked her duty, you upheld it in her stead. Let this gift be our thanks.
hc5778da9g7e0eg42d9gbe69g999207363ecf: You burn like fire, you howl like wind. You are Faithwarden.
h54c54bcfg494bg4e09g9600g2749561ec95e: A Faithwarden speaks with the authority of the four elements. When you speak, the circles will listen.
h05edea4dg7272g4f2cgafd6gbb1e33e7dd74: Go forth, and let your might be known.
hba96fb74g8662g4978gbcdeg4d50ce9d1d97: You have saved Kagha from herself. I cannot thank you enough.
he7c93cfcg73ddg46e7g921cgfad24486601f: A tragedy, that Kagha would turn her back on shadow, only to succumb to it.
